reason: Sample shows ~28 of 150 y_true/y_pred mismatches (~81% accuracy), well below the claimed 90.75%.
Daily returns have small positive mean (~0.001) and std ~0.006, giving an annualized Sharpe roughly consistent with the claimed 2.149.
Returns are roughly balanced with a slight positive drift, plausibly compounding to about a 1.27x total multiple as claimed.
Sample mismatch rate (~33 of 150, ~77-80% accuracy) runs several points below the claimed 83.75%.
Absolute target-prediction errors average roughly 1.0-1.2 in the sample, broadly consistent with the claimed MAE of 0.9166.
Values are uniform on ~0-100 with sample mean ~51.7, so 1000 rows sum to ~51,700, matching the claim 51697.848.
